creator: stephon@gmail.com
text:
Hello All,

I've tried using the latest diff.
But while compiling, it shows error:

ParseRules.cc:34:27: error: ParseRulesCType: No such file or directory
ParseRules.cc:37:34: error: ParseRulesCTypeToUpper: No such file or
directory
ParseRules.cc:40:34: error: ParseRulesCTypeToLower: No such file or
directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0/lib/ts.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0/lib/ts.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0/lib.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver.

And according to this thread,
http://mail-archives.apache.org/mod_mbox/trafficserver-users/201212.mbox/%3CCAKFabELv3RTcE5YPhTvqCWm+rinY6W82KsBtvAQPf_+wNhR5eA@mail.gmail.com%3E

should use gmake while compiling ?
